_doc: Balance config for AGI Rush. All costs/rates derive from these curves. Target: ~35-40 min first playthrough.

core._note: 1 FLOP + Computer(+2) = 3 FLOPS total. 3 LoC/key @ 6keys/s = 18 LoC/s produced, 3 executed. Editor fills up fast. First minute is about watching code pile up, then buying auto-type.

costCurve._doc: cost(n) = baseCost * growthRate^n. Growth rate per category.

hardware._note: Moderate scaling — player buys 15-30 of each hardware piece

typing._note: Gentle — keep early game flowing, 20-40 purchases feel good

devs._note: Slightly steeper — each dev is a bigger deal

aiModels._note: Flat — AI models are one-time purchases, cost is fixed

infrastructure._note: Steep — data centers and pipelines are major investments

tierProgression._doc: Each tier unlocks at a cash threshold. cashPerLoc increases per tier. Tier base costs ~10-12x total wealth at unlock time.

tiers._note: 5 FLOPS * $0.10 = $0.50/s base income. First buy ($5) in ~10s. Tier 1 ($100) in ~3min with upgrades.
5x cash bump. First real acceleration. Mechanical keyboard is the breakthrough.
5x cash bump. Devs start auto-writing. Player can breathe.
4x cash bump. Scaling up. Series A is the breakthrough moment.
5x cash bump. AI arrives. FLOPS slider unlocks. The crunch returns.
10x cash bump. Final sprint. Numbers go exponential.

pacing._doc: Walls and breakthroughs mapped to real time. Max time-to-next-purchase should NEVER exceed 120s.

phases.name: Opening Rush
phases.feel: Rapid clicking, instant feedback, learn the loop

phases.name: First Wall
phases.feel: Saving for SSD or next tier. Tension builds.

phases.name: Breakthrough 1 — Freelancing
phases.feel: Tier unlock. 5x cash. Buying spree. Mechanical Keyboard is the big hit.

phases.name: Growth Phase
phases.feel: Steady accumulation. Desktop PCs, coffee machine.

phases.name: Second Wall
phases.feel: Saving for Startup tier. Longest wait so far.

phases.name: Breakthrough 2 — Startup
phases.feel: Devs arrive! Auto-LoC starts. Player stops mashing as hard.

phases.name: Mid-game Expansion
phases.feel: Scaling dev teams, cloud servers. Numbers climbing.

phases.name: Third Wall
phases.feel: Grinding toward Tech Company. Series A is the carrot.

phases.name: Breakthrough 3 — AI Unlocks
phases.feel: AI models! Slider appears. New mechanic. Buying spree on models.

phases.name: Final Wall
phases.feel: FLOPS crunch. AI eats compute. Quality management. Hardest stretch.

phases.name: Climax — AGI Race
phases.feel: Numbers go wild. Self-improving AI. Dyson sphere. The Singularity.

phases.name: End
phases.feel: Victory screen. Did you build AGI, or did AGI build you?

multipliers._doc: Milestone-based multipliers. These create the 'bumpy curve' — the slow-slow-BOOM feeling.

ownershipMilestones._note: First x2 — feels great early game
Second x2 — player is invested now
Only reachable for cheap buildings. Feels legendary.

multipliers._usage: When player owns N of any single upgrade, all production from that upgrade gets the multiplier. Multipliers stack multiplicatively: 10+25+50 = x2*x2*x3 = x12 total.

qualityCurve._doc: Code quality degrades as AI-generated LoC accumulates without review.
qualityCurve._decayNote: Quality drifts down 0.5%/min passively from tech debt. Accelerates with more AI output.
qualityCurve._aiDecayNote: Extra decay per AI LoC/s active. 10K AI LoC/s = +10%/min extra decay.

qualityFloors._doc: Testing Suite upgrade prevents quality dropping below these floors

flopsAllocation._doc: FLOPS slider config. Unlocks at Tier 4 (ai_lab).
flopsAllocation._execNote: 1 execution FLOP = 1 LoC executed per second
flopsAllocation._aiEffNote: 1 AI FLOP = 0.6 LoC generated per second (before model bonuses). AI is less efficient than raw execution.

events._note: No events in first 2 min. Let the player learn.

prestige._doc: Rewrite mechanic. Available after first AGI completion.
prestige._note: Each paradigm shift gives x1.5 to ALL production. Stacks multiplicatively. 3 shifts = x3.375.
